heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Slight chance of a shower or thunderstorm, then a rising chance late near the international border; any storms could be severe. Highs in the mid to upper 90s in southern valleys and in the Champlain Valley, low to mid 90s elsewhere. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Variable clouds. Chance of evening thunderstorms north of Route 2, slight chance elsewhere; any storms could again be severe. Lows from the upper 60s to mid 70s. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph early, then diminishing.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Slight chance of a shower or thunderstorm. Highs from the upper 80s to mid 90s. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph, and gusting to 15 mph, becoming west in the afternoon.
